Description.English: Our daily lunch offerings — a contemporary tribute to the Portuguese Atlantic with seasonal ingredients, traditional fire, and the salt of the sea
Description.Portuguese: As nossas ofertas diárias de almoço — uma homenagem contemporânea ao Atlântico português com ingredientes sazonais, fogo tradicional e o sal do mar

Description.English: Light bites to begin — petiscos to open the meal with intention
Description.Portuguese: Petiscos leves para começar — abrir a refeição com intenção

FullDescription.English: Slow-cooked roasted pumpkin soup with ginger and coconut cream
FullDescription.Portuguese: Sopa de abóbora assada cozida lentamente com gengibre e creme de coco

Ingredients.English: Pumpkin, ginger, coconut cream, onion, garlic, olive oil
Ingredients.Portuguese: Abóbora, gengibre, creme de coco, cebola, alho, azeite

ShortDescription.English: Selection of fine cheeses with accompaniments
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Seleção de queijos finos com acompanhamentos

FullDescription.English: A curated selection of local and imported cheeses served with crackers, honey, walnuts and dried fruits
FullDescription.Portuguese: Uma seleção cuidada de queijos locais e importados servidos com crackers, mel, nozes e frutos secos

Ingredients.English: Assorted cheeses, crackers, honey, walnuts, dried fruits
Ingredients.Portuguese: Queijos variados, crackers, mel, nozes, frutos secos

Allergens.Portuguese: Leite, Glúten, Frutos de casca rija

ShortDescription.English: Grilled bread with tomato and basil
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Pão grelhado com tomate e manjericão

FullDescription.English: Crispy grilled bread topped with fresh diced tomato, basil and a drizzle of olive oil
FullDescription.Portuguese: Pão grelhado crocante coberto com tomate fresco picado, manjericão e um fio de azeite

Ingredients.English: Bread, tomato, basil, olive oil, garlic

Description.English: Hearty dishes for a satisfying lunch — traditional fire, honest craft
Description.Portuguese: Pratos substanciais para um almoço satisfatório — fogo tradicional, artesanato honesto

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Peito de frango grelhado marinado em ervas

FullDescription.English: Tender chicken breast marinated in lemon, garlic and herbs, served with seasonal vegetables and roasted potatoes
FullDescription.Portuguese: Peito de frango tenro marinado em limão, alho e ervas, servido com legumes da época e batatas assadas

Ingredients.English: Chicken breast, lemon, garlic, rosemary, thyme, potatoes, seasonal vegetables
Ingredients.Portuguese: Peito de frango, limão, alho, alecrim, tomilho, batatas, legumes da época

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Entrecosto selado com molho de pimenta

FullDescription.English: Pan-seared 200g ribeye steak finished with a classic peppercorn sauce, served with fries and salad
FullDescription.Portuguese: Bife de entrecosto de 200g selado em frigideira com molho clássico de pimenta, servido com batatas fritas e salada

Ingredients.English: Ribeye steak, black pepper, cream, butter, shallots, brandy
Ingredients.Portuguese: Bife de entrecosto, pimenta preta, natas, manteiga, chalotas, brandy

ShortDescription.English: Creamy Arborio rice with wild mushrooms
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Arroz Arborio cremoso com cogumelos silvestres

FullDescription.English: Slow-stirred Arborio rice with a medley of wild mushrooms, white wine, parmesan and fresh thyme
FullDescription.Portuguese: Arroz Arborio mexido lentamente com variedade de cogumelos silvestres, vinho branco, parmesão e tomilho fresco

Ingredients.English: Arborio rice, mushrooms, parmesan, white wine, onion, butter, thyme
Ingredients.Portuguese: Arroz Arborio, cogumelos, parmesão, vinho branco, cebola, manteiga, tomilho

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Salmão do Atlântico com manteiga de limão

FullDescription.English: Fresh Atlantic salmon fillet grilled to perfection, served with lemon butter sauce, steamed asparagus and new potatoes
FullDescription.Portuguese: Filete de salmão do Atlântico fresco grelhado na perfeição, servido com molho de manteiga de limão, espargos cozidos a vapor e batatinhas novas

Ingredients.English: Salmon fillet, lemon, butter, asparagus, new potatoes, dill
Ingredients.Portuguese: Filete de salmão, limão, manteiga, espargos, batatinhas novas, endro

Description.English: Fresh and vibrant salads — seasonal ingredients at their peak
Description.Portuguese: Saladas frescas e vibrantes — ingredientes sazonais no seu melhor

ShortDescription.English: Romaine, parmesan and classic Caesar dressing
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Alface romana, parmesão e molho César clássico

FullDescription.English: Crisp romaine lettuce tossed with house-made Caesar dressing, shaved parmesan and crunchy croutons
FullDescription.Portuguese: Alface romana crocante misturada com molho César caseiro, parmesão em lascas e croutons crocantes

Ingredients.English: Romaine lettuce, parmesan, croutons, Caesar dressing, lemon
Ingredients.Portuguese: Alface romana, parmesão, croutons, molho César, limão

FullDescription.English: Classic Italian salad with sliced buffalo mozzarella, ripe tomatoes and fresh basil, drizzled with extra virgin olive oil and balsamic glaze
FullDescription.Portuguese: Salada italiana clássica com mozzarella de búfala fatiada, tomates maduros e manjericão fresco, regada com azeite extra virgem e redução de balsâmico

Ingredients.English: Buffalo mozzarella, tomato, fresh basil, olive oil, balsamic glaze
Ingredients.Portuguese: Mozzarella de búfala, tomate, manjericão fresco, azeite, redução de balsâmico

Description.English: Sweet endings to your meal — traditional Portuguese comfort and European classics
Description.Portuguese: Finais doces para a sua refeição — conforto português tradicional e clássicos europeus

ShortDescription.English: Rich dark chocolate tart with ganache
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Torta de chocolate negro rica com ganache

FullDescription.English: Crisp pastry shell filled with a smooth dark chocolate ganache, served with a dollop of crème fraîche
FullDescription.Portuguese: Massa estaladiça recheada com ganache de chocolate negro suave, servida com uma colherada de crème fraîche

Ingredients.English: Dark chocolate, cream, butter, eggs, sugar, pastry
Ingredients.Portuguese: Chocolate negro, natas, manteiga, ovos, açúcar, massa

ShortDescription.English: Silky vanilla custard with caramelised sugar
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Creme de baunilha sedoso com açúcar caramelizado

FullDescription.English: Classic French vanilla custard with a perfectly torched caramelised sugar crust, served with seasonal berries
FullDescription.Portuguese: Creme de baunilha francês clássico com uma crosta de açúcar caramelizado perfeitamente queimado, servido com frutos vermelhos da época

Ingredients.English: Cream, egg yolks, sugar, vanilla, seasonal berries
Ingredients.Portuguese: Natas, gemas de ovo, açúcar, baunilha, frutos vermelhos da época

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Sobremesa italiana de mascarpone embebido em café

FullDescription.English: Layers of espresso-soaked ladyfinger biscuits and whipped mascarpone cream, dusted with cocoa powder
FullDescription.Portuguese: Camadas de biscoitos embebidos em espresso e creme de mascarpone batido, polvilhados com cacau em pó

Ingredients.English: Mascarpone, eggs, sugar, espresso, ladyfinger biscuits, cocoa powder
Ingredients.Portuguese: Mascarpone, ovos, açúcar, espresso, biscoitos savoiardi, cacau em pó

ShortDescription.English: Portuguese-style French toast with cinnamon sugar
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Rabanada portuguesa com açúcar e canela

FullDescription.English: Thick slices of bread soaked in egg and milk, fried until golden and dusted with cinnamon sugar — a classic Portuguese comfort dessert
FullDescription.Portuguese: Fatias grossas de pão embebidas em ovo e leite, fritas até ficarem douradas e polvilhadas com açúcar e canela — uma sobremesa reconfortante portuguesa clássica

Ingredients.English: Bread, eggs, milk, sugar, cinnamon, olive oil
Ingredients.Portuguese: Pão, ovos, leite, açúcar, canela, azeite

Description.English: Refreshing beverages to complement your meal
Description.Portuguese: Bebidas refrescantes para complementar a sua refeição

ShortDescription.Portuguese: Limonada com gás feita na casa

FullDescription.English: Freshly squeezed lemon juice with sparkling water, a touch of honey and fresh mint
FullDescription.Portuguese: Sumo de limão espremido na hora com água com gás, um toque de mel e hortelã fresca

Ingredients.English: Lemon juice, sparkling water, honey, mint, ice
Ingredients.Portuguese: Sumo de limão, água com gás, mel, hortelã, gelo

ShortDescription.English: Cold brew over ice with milk
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Cold brew com gelo e leite

FullDescription.English: Smooth cold-brew coffee served over ice with your choice of whole milk or oat milk
FullDescription.Portuguese: Café cold brew suave servido com gelo com a sua escolha de leite gordo ou leite de aveia

Ingredients.English: Cold brew coffee, ice, milk or oat milk
Ingredients.Portuguese: Café cold brew, gelo, leite ou leite de aveia

ShortDescription.English: Vodka, ginger beer and fresh lime
ShortDescription.Portuguese: Vodka, cerveja de gengibre e lima fresca

FullDescription.English: Classic Moscow Mule served in a copper mug with vodka, spicy ginger beer, fresh lime juice and a sprig of mint
FullDescription.Portuguese: Moscow Mule clássico servido em caneca de cobre com vodka, cerveja de gengibre picante, sumo de lima fresco e um ramo de hortelã

Ingredients.English: Vodka, ginger beer, lime juice, mint, ice
Ingredients.Portuguese: Vodka, cerveja de gengibre, sumo de lima, hortelã, gelo
